task: Analyze whether Pytrader app needs to be run in Docker for Contabo VPS migration
decisions_made: Determined Docker is not strictly required but highly recommended for VPS deployment due to multi-service architecture (FastAPI, Next.js, Postgres).
Advised user that current setup uses Docker only for Postgres and needs Dockerfiles for frontend/backend for full containerization.

task: Migrate to PostgreSQL and add logout logic to user dashboard
decisions_made: Removed SQLite imports and conditionals to enforce PostgreSQL in database.py
Removed DB_TYPE from docker-compose.yml and config.py
Added handleLogout to Sidebar.tsx to clear cookies and localStorage, then redirect to /login

task: Implement robust automatic logout on 401 Unauthorized responses
decisions_made: Added global intercepts to all dashboard pages for API fetch responses
Configured the frontend to automatically clear localStorage and redirect to /login when a 401 Unauthorized status is hit. This replicates industry standards.

task: Refine Admin UI and fix backend deletion bug
decisions_made: Renamed backend admin delete function to fix recursion name-collision bug.
Modified UserTable.tsx to hide 'Edit' and role selection (enforcing CLI management).
Restricted 'Delete' button to regular users only (hiding it for admin accounts).
